title: calamaria drummondii
intro: Calamaria drummondii, also known as Drummond's calamaria or Drummond's calamite, is a type of club moss that belongs to the Lycopodiopsida class of plants. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Calamaria drummondii is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
